name: Log File Analyzer
description: Analyze application logs to find errors and patterns

agents.name: Log Parser
agents.purpose: Parse and analyze log files for errors and patterns
agents.system_prompt_hint: Parse the log data. Identify error types and frequencies. Find patterns in timing, endpoints, or user actions that correlate with errors. Note any cascading failures.

agents.name: Incident Reporter
agents.system_prompt_hint: Write an incident report. Include: timeline of events, root cause analysis, affected services, error frequency charts, and recommended fixes prioritized by severity.

suggestion_card.title: Log Analyzer
suggestion_card.subtitle: Find errors and patterns in logs
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Analyze these logs for errors: [paste logs]

author: agentfactory
